name: Proline Adult Dog Food Canned Beef, Liver & Peas Chunks in Gravy 415g
shortDescription: (4 pieces minimum order) Fully balanced all-natural wet dog food with beef, liver & peas protein. Carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult dogs.
description: Proline Adult Dog Food Canned - Beef Chunks in Gravy , fully balanced all-natural dog food with beef, liver & peas protein. Carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult dogs. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein ...........................................7% Fat .................................................. 4% Crude Ash ......................................... 2% Crude Cellulose (Fiber)....................0.3% Moisture ...........................................82% INGREDIENTS: Meat and animal derivatives (4% beef, 4% liver), cereals, minerals, vegetable by-products, sugar. MINERALS: Zinc, Manganese, Copper. VITAMINS: Vit. D3, Vit. E.
